commands.repair_reason: This protected draft maintainer PR needs author or maintainer handling for heap artifact policy, allowFrom hydration compatibility, and refreshed live proof before merge.; Needs attention: The diff enables complete heap snapshots in a live WhatsApp workflow and places them under uploaded QA artifacts.; Review finding: [P1] Keep heap snapshots out of uploaded live artifacts — .github/workflows/qa-live-transports-conv... commands.review_summary:
The branch adds WhatsApp live QA diagnostics/setup reductions, skips some WhatsApp group hydration for DM-only sessions, preloads PI model provider plugins, skips thinking-catalog resolution when thinking is off, and updates tests/changelog.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review findings: source inspection of the PR head shows heap checkpoints are enabled and copied into uploaded artifacts, and the hydration predicate omits the current allowFrom fallback contract.
